control.description-key: Interactive Gantt chart with drag-resize, dependencies, view mode toggle, and baseline display. Wraps frappe-gantt.

data-set.name: dataSet
data-set.description-key: The data source containing tasks (SharePoint list, Dataverse table, or collection)

property.name: taskTitleColumn
property.description-key: Column name containing the task title (e.g. Title)

property.name: startDateColumn
property.description-key: Column name containing the start date (e.g. Start)

property.name: endDateColumn
property.description-key: Column name containing the end date (e.g. EndDate)

property.name: percentCompleteColumn
property.description-key: Column name for progress percentage (e.g. PercentComplete).

property.name: predecessorColumn
property.description-key: Column name for dependencies (e.g. Predecessor). Format: comma-separated IDs.

property.name: statusColumn
property.description-key: Column name for status, used for bar color coding (e.g. Status).

property.name: outlineLevelColumn
property.description-key: Column for WBS depth (e.g. OutlineLevel). Used to indent task labels.

property.name: parentIdColumn
property.description-key: Column for parent task ID (e.g. ParentTaskId). For summary bar rollup.

property.name: sortOrderColumn
property.description-key: Column for display order within siblings (e.g. SortOrder).

property.name: defaultViewMode
property.description-key: Initial timeline scale: Day, Week, Month, or Quarter.

property.name: chartHeight
property.description-key: Height of the chart in pixels (0 = auto).

property.name: enableDragResize
property.description-key: Allow users to drag bar edges to change dates.

property.name: baselineStartColumn
property.description-key: Column for baseline start date. Leave empty to hide baseline.

property.name: onDateChange
property.description-key: Fires when a bar is dragged. JSON: {id, start, end}

property.name: onProgressChange
property.description-key: Fires when progress handle is dragged. JSON: {id, progress}

property.name: onTaskClick
property.description-key: Fires when a bar is clicked. JSON: {id, title}
